ddls:
CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the emission data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the countries table */,
  "gas_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the gases table */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sectors table */,
  "tonnes_co2" REAL /* Total tonnes of CO2 equivalent emissions */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data sources table */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the emission record */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the emission record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_gas_id FOREIGN KEY ("gas_id") REFERENCES gases ("gas_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Two-letter ISO code for each country */,
  "iso3_code" TEXT /* Three-letter ISO code for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Agriculture, Energy) */,
  "sector_category" TEXT /* Category of the sector (e.g., primary, secondary, tertiary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gases" (
  "gas_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gas type */,
  "gas_type" TEXT /* Type of greenhouse gas (e.g., CO2, CH4) */,
  "gas_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula for the gas */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gas_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the emission record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the emission record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user (e.g., read-only, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_emission_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_id") REFERENCES emissions ("emission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission record the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel, PDF) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_emission_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_id") REFERENCES emissions ("emission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission record the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF, DOCX) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_emission_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_id") REFERENCES emissions ("emission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_sources" (
  "source_link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source link */,
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_sources_emission_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_id") REFERENCES emissions ("emission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Starting year of the trend period */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Ending year of the trend period */,
  "total_emissions" REAL /* Total emissions over the trend period in tonnes of CO2 equivalent */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_trends_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_trends_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Starting year of the target period */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Ending year of the target period */,
  "target_emission" REAL /* Target emissions to be achieved by the end of the period in tonnes of CO2 equivalent */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of target (e.g., reduction, increase, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_targets_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_targets_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report in MB */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission record affected */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., update, delete, access) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action (e.g., changes made, reason for access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_emission_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_id") REFERENCES emissions ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
